description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a dark gable roof and a muted brown exterior, surrounded by a wooden fence and lush green trees. The front facade features multiple symmetrically arranged windows and a small balcony with a railing, while the main entryway is partially obscured by foliage. The backyard includes a cylindrical water tank and a grassy area, enclosed by a wooden fence. The house is part of a small residential grouping, with a paved driveway and a narrow road separating it from a similar neighboring house. The windows are rectangular and evenly spaced, contributing to a balanced and orderly appearance. The overall design is practical and modern, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gable roof, brown exterior, symmetrical windows, and a fenced yard with trees and a water tank.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main facade with symmetrical windows, a small balcony, and dense trees partially obscuring the entryway.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the gable roof profile, the driveway, and the proximity to a neighboring house, with trees and fencing visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the backyard with a grassy area, wooden fence, and a cylindrical water tank, as well as the back windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the gable roof, driveway, and the arrangement of houses and trees along the property line.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway partially obscured by trees, with a small porch and steps, simple door, and minimal decorative elements.
